codeReview.summary: The artifact uploader generates the expected run-scoped milestone and manifest keys, records uploaded artifact metadata, and deliberately treats upload failures as non-fatal so run execution can continue. The reviewed diff matches the feature description and I did not find any additional issues in this feature beyond the upstream screenshot-format concern already noted against the agent loop integration.

summary: Reviewed the mission docs, handoff, transcript evidence, and commit `fae95b6d1154ff6dd937f98b131c77b0a77058c2` for `r2-artifact-upload`. The uploader behavior matches the milestone contract and passes review.
